description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow set within a landscaped plot featuring a mix of green lawns, paved driveways, and tree plantings. The building has a flat roof with multiple levels and terraces, and its exterior is composed of a combination of light gray and white surfaces, accented by wooden and glass elements. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically along the facades, providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, a fenced backyard area, and several outdoor seating and patio spaces. The surrounding grounds are neatly organized, with a row of trees lining the driveway and additional trees and shrubs placed strategically around the house. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood accents, and landscaped grounds featuring driveways, patios, and trees. The design is open and geometric, with multiple terraces and outdoor living areas.
description_view_0: From this view, the main entrance, driveway, and carport are visible, along with the front lawn and a row of trees lining the driveway.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the rear patio, backyard, and a large terrace area, as well as the asymmetrical window arrangement and outdoor seating spaces.
description_view_2: The side view shows the extensive patio, glass doors, and a long fence bordering the property, with a clear view of the flat roof's multiple levels.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the driveway, carport, and the row of trees along the side, with the main building mass and rear garden visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
